scenarios.description: When systemProperties is false and .env file is empty, no entries loop executed and returns empty Dotenv
scenarios.precondition: Create temporary directory with empty .env file; use real DotenvReader and DotenvParser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries() is empty; System.getProperty(...) unchanged for any key; no exception

scenarios.description: When systemProperties is false and .env file has one entry, loop executes once and returns single entry
scenarios.precondition: Create .env file in temp directory with single line 'KEY=VALUE'; use real parser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries() contains exactly one DotenvEntry(key="KEY", value="VALUE"); no System property set

scenarios.description: When systemProperties is false and .env file has multiple entries, loop executes multiple times and returns all entries
scenarios.precondition: Create .env file with lines 'A=1','B=2','C=3'; use real parser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned entries have size 3 and contain A=1, B=2, C=3; no System properties set

scenarios.description: When systemProperties is true and .env has one entry, branch-true path sets system property then returns entry
scenarios.precondition: Create .env with 'X=Y'; use real parser; no manual mocking
scenarios.expectedResult: System.getProperty("X") == "Y"; returned entries contain new DotenvEntry("X","Y");

scenarios.description: When systemProperties is true and .env is empty, branch-true path executes no loop and returns empty Dotenv
scenarios.precondition: Create empty .env file; real parser; systemProperties enabled
scenarios.expectedResult: returned entries() is empty; no new System properties set

scenarios.description: When .env file is malformed, parser.parse throws DotenvException and load propagates it
scenarios.precondition: Create .env file with invalid syntax; use real parser
scenarios.expectedResult: throws DotenvException; no System properties set; no Dotenv returned
